what: Metadata dependency map for FSC-2417: 7 file(s) changed, detected=['financialaccount', 'suitability__c'], depth=2
why: FSC-2417 development detected changes to FinancialAccount and Suitability__c objects with an implied parent dependency on RiskProfile__c, forming a two-level dependency chain. The refinement prediction included FinancialAccount, Goal__c, Individual, RiskProfile__c, and Suitability__c; the actual development scope covers FinancialAccount and Suitability__c with RiskProfile__c as a parent, representing a tighter focus on suitability assessment logic rather than goals or individual records. The scope is consistent with the story intent, though Goal__c and Individual were predicted but not modified—this suggests the story narrowed focus post-refinement, which is acceptable if justified by acceptance criteria.
